items.name_en: The bucket bag is a signature style for many fashion bloggers, suitable for both commuting and casual wear. Canvas material is structured and durable, creating a more three-dimensional silhouette when worn. It offers ample capacity and an adjustable shoulder strap! Plus, it's very lightweight. As a new member of this series, it's bound to captivate many bag lovers!

items.name_en: The Butterfly Buckle (Bow Shoulder Bag) has become a Bottega Veneta bestseller with its unique elegance. This new leather & canvas version is perfectly tailored for spring and summer. The natural laziness of the linen fabric and chestnut leather bring out a strong vintage vibe, offering a unique charm that differs from the all-leather version.

items.name_en: The Celine Triomphe collection is a must-have this year, it's so beautiful! It's a global hit with many bloggers and influencers posting about it. Every Triomphe piece has its own unique charm. This tofu bag is truly lovely, casual and retro, yet very stylish. It has three compartments, which is plenty of space for a girl to put in her phone and cosmetics. The shoulder strap is adjustable! It looks cooler when worn, and can be sweet or edgy. Dimensions: Large 22 16 Small 18.5 14. Item No.: Large 191242 Small 188882

items.name_en: The D-Dream bag is a new arrival for the 2025 Fall/Winter collection, offering a casual modern look with practical functionality. It features a soft silhouette crafted from blue denim calfskin. The spacious zippered compartment is paired with two side pockets with magnetic flaps, adorned with vintage gold-finish metal CD logos for easy storage of daily essentials. The medium size comes with an adjustable top handle and an adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap, allowing for shoulder or crossbody wear, making it an ideal companion for daily use.
items.name_cn:
The D-Dream bag is a new arrival for the 2025 Fall/Winter collection, offering a casual modern look with practical functionality. It features a soft silhouette crafted from blue denim calfskin. The spacious zippered compartment is paired with two side pockets with magnetic flaps, adorned with vintage gold-finish metal CD logos for easy storage of daily essentials. The medium size comes with an adjustable top handle and an adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap, allowing for shoulder or crossbody wear, making it an ideal companion for daily use.
Main material: Calfskin
CD logos on both sides
Zipper closure
Adjustable top handle
Adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap
Side pockets with magnetic flaps
Internal slip pocket
Includes dust bag
Made in Italy Dimensions: 24 x 14 x 9 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 wallet, 1 card holder, 1 phone, sunglasses, and lipstick
Top handle length: 50 - 56 cm
Top handle to bag top length: 21 - 22 cm
Dimensions and weight may vary depending on the product material
Item number: M6323

items.name_en: The D-Dream bag is a new arrival from the 2025 Fall/Winter Collection, offering a casual, modern look with practical functionality. With a soft silhouette, it is crafted from black lambskin featuring extra-large woven quilting for a stylish touch. It features a spacious zip compartment and two side pockets with magnetic flaps, both accented with vintage gold-finish metal CD logos for easy storage of daily items. The medium size comes with an adjustable top handle and an adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap, allowing it to be worn on the shoulder or crossbody, making it an ideal everyday companion.

items.name_en: The Dior Jolie Top Handle Mini Chain Bag is a new arrival from the 2026 Cruise Collection, featuring an elegant and practical design. Crafted from white lambskin with a woven pattern, the flap is accented with a gold-finish metal CD logo and white resin beads. It includes one interior compartment for daily essentials. With double top handles and an adjustable, detachable CD chain strap featuring leather and CD links with white resin beads, it can be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody, suitable for both casual and evening looks.
items.name_cn:
The Dior Jolie Top Handle Mini Chain Bag is a new arrival from the 2026 Cruise Collection, featuring an elegant and practical design. Crafted from white lambskin with a woven pattern, the flap is accented with a gold-finish metal CD logo and white resin beads. It includes one interior compartment for daily essentials. With double top handles and an adjustable, detachable CD chain strap featuring leather and CD links with white resin beads, it can be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody, suitable for both casual and evening looks.
Main material: Lambskin
Lining: Lambskin
Magnetic flap closure with CD buckle and white resin beads on the front
1 compartment
Double top leather handles
Adjustable, detachable chain with resin beads and leather strap
Made in Italy Dimensions: 18.5 x 13 x 8.5 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 mobile phone, 1 card holder, sunglasses, and lipstick
Style number: S3123

items.name_en: The highly anticipated Amazona 180 finally arrives!
items.name_cn:
The highly anticipated Amazona 180 finally arrives!
Featuring a contrast of patent calfskin + suede lining, it feels soft and smooth, maximizing the premium feel!
Classic bag shape, iconic Anagram embossing, and a vintage yet stylish vibe!
Double zipper closure. Although mini and exquisite, it has enough capacity for powder, phone, tissues, etc.!
The mini size looks relaxed whether carried by hand or crossbody!
This Amazona is definitely a treasure this year💗
mini model number 89351 size 20*11.5*7 (box gift bag)

specs.rawTitle:
The highly anticipated Amazona 180 finally arrives!
Featuring a contrast of patent calfskin + suede lining, it feels soft and smooth, maximizing the premium feel!
Classic bag shape, iconic Anagram embossing, and a vintage yet stylish vibe!
Double zipper closure. Although mini and exquisite, it has enough capacity for powder, phone, tissues, etc.!
The mini size looks relaxed whether carried by hand or crossbody!
This Amazona is definitely a treasure this year💗
mini model number 89351 size 20*11.5*7 (box gift bag)

items.name_en: The highly anticipated Amazona 180 finally arrives!
items.name_cn:
The highly anticipated Amazona 180 finally arrives!
Featuring a contrast of fine soft matte calfskin + patent calfskin + suede Napa sheepskin lining, it feels soft and smooth, maximizing the premium feel!
Classic bag shape, iconic Anagram embossing + retro briefcase silhouette.
The large size looks cool and is photogenic when worn under the arm.
The interior has a magnetic closure and is quite spacious!
Three carrying ways: Hand, underarm, or crossbody.
The whole bag exudes a "natural and casual" French lazy vibe!
Large model number 89357-1
size:34.5*27*14 (gift bag only)

items.name_en: The highly anticipated Amazona 180 is finally here!
items.name_cn:
The highly anticipated Amazona 180 is finally here!
Featuring a mix of smooth nappa leather and patent calfskin with suede lining, the leather gets better with time!
Classic silhouette with the iconic Anagram embossing, full of retro and chic vibes!
Double zipper closure with ample capacity, suitable for commuting or dates.
Small size can be worn on the shoulder, carried by hand, or crossbody; three styles to switch between! The handbag style is professional for commuting, while the crossbody gives a casual, relaxed look. Very practical!
This Amazona 180 is definitely a treasure this year 💗
Small model number 89356 Dimensions 24✕18.5*10 (box and gift bag included)

The highly anticipated Amazona 180 is finally here!
Featuring a mix of patent calfskin and suede lining, the calfskin is soft, smooth, and premium. The leather develops a beautiful patina over time!
Classic silhouette, iconic Anagram embossing, and a perfect blend of vintage and modern vibes.
Double zipper closure with ample capacity, suitable for commuting or dates.
Small size can be worn crossbody, handheld, or shoulder; three ways to switch freely! The handheld look is professional for work, while crossbody gives a relaxed casual feel. Very practical!
This Amazona 180 is definitely a treasure this year 💗
Item No. 89352 Dimensions 24✕18.5*10 (box, gift bag)
